scene.message: Am I seeing things?{nl} Was she always... like that?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ...It's not as if I{nl} keep their company by choice.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: At least it's for{nl} certain she doesn't mean me!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: No way! Was Himeno{nl} always this nasty?!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: What's that supposed to{nl} mean, "people like that"!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: That's not Himeno!{nl} She was never like that!{waitkey}{ret}
